title: Modulo_E_Esquema_Financiero
description: Capítulo IV, Sección I, Apartado E — Lineamientos EFICINE Producción enero 2026. PASS/FAIL. The financial structure proving the project is fully funded. Missing ANY element = not evaluated.

e1_esquema_financiero_formato_9.description: FORMATO 9. Master financing table. Must be dated and signed by ERPI legal representative.

total_mxn.description: Must equal costo_total_proyecto_mxn. Must equal budget total. Must equal flujo de efectivo total.

e1_validaciones_financieras.description: Hard compliance checks. ALL must pass or the project is rejected.

erpi_aportacion_porcentaje.description: ERPI exclusive contribution (cash + in-kind + third-party donations registered in carta de aportación) must be >= 20% of total cost.

eficine_porcentaje.description: EFICINE stimulus cannot exceed 80% of total cost.

eficine_monto_mxn.description: EFICINE stimulus cannot exceed $25,000,000 MXN (2026 cap for production).

total_recursos_federales_porcentaje.description: Sum of ALL federal resources (EFICINE + FOCINE + any other IMCINE/federal grants) cannot exceed 80% of total cost.

especie_honorarios_porcentaje_total.description: Total in-kind contributions via professional fees (honorarios) cannot exceed 10% of total budget.

e2_carta_aportacion_exclusiva_formato_10.description: FORMATO 10. ERPI declares its exclusive contribution. Signed by legal representative. Accompanied by proof of funds.

donativos_terceros_incluidos.description: Third-party donations received by ERPI are registered HERE and added to ERPI's contribution in the esquema financiero.

prueba_fondos_efectivo.description: For cash contributions: proof of solvency.

enum: Estados de cuenta bancarios completos a nombre de ERPI
Carta de institución bancaria firmada por responsable autorizado
tipo_documento.description: ONLY these two forms are accepted. Screenshots of online banking, tickets, credit letters, or any other document that doesn't guarantee fund availability are EXPLICITLY REJECTED.

fecha_documento.description: Must be no more than 3 months old at registration close.

prueba_fondos_especie.description: For in-kind contributions: proof of ownership and availability.

enum: Cartas de apoyo / convenio (for honorarios donativo)

e3_donativos_terceros.description: Required if ERPI declares third-party donations in esquema financiero. ALL documents in a SINGLE PDF file.

acta_constitutiva.description: Not required for federal/state/municipal entities. Not required translation for foreign entities.

poder_notarial.description: Only for national companies. Highlight the power clause.

carta_apoyo_o_convenio.description: Must include: project title (matching system), donor name, amount (highlighted), signature.

e4_coproductores_y_anticipos.description: Required if project has co-producers, distribution advances (MG), or VOD platform pre-sales. ALL documents in a SINGLE PDF file.

contrato.description: Contract must include all required elements.

desglose_especie.description: If in-kind, must detail each item.

tipo_cambio_mxn.description: For foreign currency contributions: must state MXN equivalent and the exchange rate as of the system registration date.

reconocimiento_coproduccion_imcine.description: ONLY for international co-productions: prior recognition from IMCINE's Dirección de Apoyo a la Producción Cinematográfica. MUST be obtained BEFORE submission.

e5_reglas_acreditacion_aportaciones.description: Universal rules for ALL contributions (ERPI and third parties). These are hard rejections if violated.

documentos_menos_3_meses.description: ALL supporting documents must have issue dates no more than 3 months before registration close.

enum: Informe de contador público registrado SAT
gastos_previos_comprobados.description: If claiming prior cash expenses, must prove with CFDIs per FORMATO 11 OR a CPA financial report per Art. 52 CFF.

aportante_multiproyecto_solvencia.description: If same contributor is in multiple projects: bank statements must show sufficient balance for ALL committed contributions.

default: Capturas de pantalla de banca en línea
Cartas de crédito de instituciones financieras
Cualquier documento que no garantice disponibilidad real

tipos_permitidos.const: Servicios profesionales (honorarios), bienes, o derechos patrimoniales — siempre susceptibles de valoración económica comprobable y SIN impuestos.

tipo_aportacion_debe_corresponder_objeto.description: The contribution type must match the contributor's corporate purpose or economic activity (proven by acta constitutiva or constancia de situación fiscal).
